creator: pjfloyd@wanadoo.fr
text:
I pushed a change to the Valgrind repo that will improve this.

I don't have plans right now to bump devel/valgrind-devel - probably when the patch in https://bugs.kde.org/show_bug.cgi?id=433859 lands. devel/valgrind will next be updated when 3.22 is released, in October.

commit 73ec73ed7fe20ec6427dba63e52534136f3c19bd (HEAD -> master, origin/master, origin/HEAD)
Author: Paul Floyd <pjfloyd@wanadoo.fr>
Date:   Sun Jul 2 12:59:40 2023 +0200

    FreeBSD: add default to configure.ac FreeBSD 13 versions
    
    Also add comment to README.freebsd about ensuring that
    jails set "uname -r" to be something compatible with the
    normal RELEASE/STABLE/CURRENT releases.
